title: AEX Premium Table Spoons, Stainless Steel Spoon Set of 6, Round Edge & Mirror Polished, Dishwasher Safe, 20.5cm.[Silver]
features: Premium Table Spoons: Elevate your dining experience with AEX's Premium Table Spoons. This set of 6 stainless steel spoons features a round edge and mirror-polished finish, making them perfect dessert spoons for any occasion.

Stainless Steel Durability: Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, AEX's tablespoons are built to last. Perfect for everyday use or special occasions, this spoon cutlery set ensures long-lasting durability and shine.
Easy Maintenance: Enjoy the convenience of dishwasher-safe tablespoons. AEX's spoons require minimal effort to maintain their pristine condition, making them an ideal choice for busy households.

Elegant Design: Each spoon in this set of 6 features a sleek, mirror-polished finish and a round edge, providing a sophisticated touch to your dining table. These versatile spoons can be used as tea spoons 12 stainless steel.

Perfect Size: Measuring 20.5cm, these table spoons are ideal for a variety of uses, from enjoying desserts to stirring your favorite beverages. Their ergonomic design ensures a comfortable grip and easy handling.
